name: 86 Chaos 15.0.71 Stable Testing Firebase Load Fix
label: 86 Chaos 15.0.71
notes: Rebuilt from the clean 15.0.64 upload. Server routes use the project_id inside FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY for no-token cron/server jobs, and the browser can be forced to the testing Firebase project with REACT_APP_FIREBASE_DEPLOYMENT_MODE=testing or REACT_APP_FIREBASE_ACTIVE_PROJECT_ID=chaos-test-d1601.
